select
distinct
from department
order by ${orderByClause}

update department

organization_id = #{record.organizationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`name` = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update department
organization_id = #{organizationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wecom_dept_id = #{wecomDeptId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
sort_order = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER},
dept_status = #{deptStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},
sync_status = #{syncStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT},

update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update department set organization_id = #{organizationId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parent_id = #{parentId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wecom_dept_id = #{wecomDeptId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, sort_order = #{sortOrder,jdbcType=INTEGER}, dept_status = #{deptStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, sync_status = #{syncStatus,jdbcType=TINYINT}, sync_time = #{syncTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, leader_wecom_userid = #{leaderWecomUserid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_user = #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
